title: Collection — Negentropic Explorations
description: A living gallery of self-contained web experiences.

experiences.title: Bouncing Balls
experiences.description: A simple 2-D physics simulation: balls bounce around a canvas with gravity and elastic collisions.

experiences.title: Recursive Subdivision
experiences.description: Generative vector patterns built from recursive subdivision and colour harmonics.

experiences.title: Configurable Fountain
experiences.description: Interactive particle fountain with trailing effects and configurable sources.

experiences.title: Procedural Visuals
experiences.description: A suite of generative sketches — circle packing, crystalline growth, cellular automata, and more.

experiences.title: Membrane Physics
experiences.description: 2D wave-equation simulations on a vibrating membrane, rendered in three.js.

experiences.title: Throat Singing Simulator
experiences.description: Web Audio synthesis of khoomei, sygyt, and kargyraa styles with live voice controls.

experiences.title: MedCurvez
experiences.description: AUC-preserving gastric delay model — interactive dose/absorption curves across medications.

experiences.title: Image Browse — Physics
experiences.description: Drop a folder of images and browse them through D3-driven physics fields.
